creator: kuriyama@sky.rim.or.jp
text:
cjh@kr.freebsd.org wrote:
> New port of Korean Input method, hanIM.
> It depends linux_locale ports, which will be submitted soon.

This port overwrites /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/locale/ko/XLC_LOCALE which is
installed at system installation.

If this new files is correct for Korean locale, should this be fixed by
XFree86 people?  Or, next release of XFree86 will include this fix?


-- 
Jun Kuriyama // kuriyama@sky.rim.or.jp
            // kuriyama@FreeBSD.ORG
